definitions: n. 持久性；长期性（在此语境下指职业生涯的持续时间）

examples.text: M: Not at all. It was hard to quit. I was tempted to stay in the game, because I love basketball and I loved my team. As for money, I turned professional at 18. So I'd actually earned a lot and saved most of it, because I had great financial advisers. [6] I knew basketball wasn't a career with a lot of longevity for most players, so I wanted to change careers while I was still young.
examples.explanation: 男：一点也不。这很难戒掉。我曾动念留在赛场上，因为我热爱篮球，也热爱我的球队。至于钱，我18岁就转为职业选手了。所以我实际上赚了很多钱，并存下了大部分，因为我有出色的理财顾问。[6] 我知道对于大多数球员来说，篮球并不是一份具有长久持续性的职业，所以我想趁年轻转换职业。
